function.name: collect_patient_info
function.description: Record the caller's full name (and phone if given). Call as soon as the patient states their name.

function.name: select_service
function.description: Record the dental service the patient wants.

function.name: select_datetime
function.description: Record the requested appointment date and time as an ISO 8601 string or natural language (e.g. 'tomorrow at 3pm').

function.name: confirm_booking
function.description: Finalize the booking after the patient confirms. Triggers the Google Calendar event and the Twilio SMS.
